caption: An educational presentation slide for a course in "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" is shown. The slide is titled "Tutorial – 2" and focuses on the "Figure of Merit (FOM)." A thermodynamic T-S diagram is displayed on the right, featuring a cyclic process with labeled paths including "T=const", "p=const", "D=const", and "h=const". The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom-left corner, and the footer identifies the instructor as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". A mathematical equation, "W/ṁ_r = 6265.22", is highlighted in a blue box on the left side of the screen. As the sequence progresses, a second equation, "W/ṁ_r = 767", appears in a similar blue box next to the first one. A mouse cursor is seen moving across the screen, appearing near the first equation before the second one manifests.
